item.title: About
item.description:
👋 Hi there, I’m [Your Name / Alias]!

Welcome to my digital garden 🌿. This is where I share my thoughts, document my technical journey, and archive bits of my life.

🚀 About Me

  • Role: [e.g., Full-Stack Engineer / Indie Hacker / Digital Nomad]
  • Focus Areas: [e.g., Web Architecture, AI Integration, UX Design]
  • Location: 📍 [e.g., Beijing, China]

Currently, I’m deeply focused on [e.g., exploring LLM applications in workflows / building SaaS products]. I love solving real-world problems with code and strongly believe in the “Less is more” philosophy.
